channel.title: SB 5820 - Concerning the responsibility of certain counties to include freight rail dependent use overlay as part of the transportation element of their comprehensive plan.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Local Government.
item.description: First reading, referred to Local Government.

item.title: 👎💵Amber Carter - Portland Vancouver Junction Railroad
item.description: Amber Carter signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Portland Vancouver Junction Railroad. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Eric Overholser - City of Battle Ground
item.description: Eric Overholser signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent City of Battle Ground.

item.title: 👎Lynda Wilson - none
item.description: Lynda Wilson signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent none.

item.title: 👍💵Bryce Yadon - Futurewise
item.description: Bryce Yadon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Futurewise. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Ken Short - AWB
item.description: Ken Short signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent AWB. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍James McRae - Citizen
item.description: James McRae signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Citizen.

item.title: 2026 legislative session update - Sen. Adrian Cortes

item.title: LGV - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LGV - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Delivered to Governor.
